name: Chicken Hawaiian
recipeIngredient: 1 Large green pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large frying pan, cook the green pepper and garlic in oil until tender.
2. Stir in the cream of chicken soup and pineapple juice from the can.
3. Add the cubed chicken, pineapple bits, and soy sauce. Simmer for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Serve over rice and top with toasted slivered almonds. To toast the almonds, place them in a preheated oven at 350°F for about 10 minutes, tossing with a tablespoon of butter to prevent burning.
